# Repository Structure

- `src/main/java/io/github/arthurhoch/kissconfig`: public API.
- `src/main/java/io/github/arthurhoch/kissconfig/annotations`: public annotations.
- `src/main/java/io/github/arthurhoch/kissconfig/exceptions`: public exception model.
- `src/main/java/io/github/arthurhoch/kissconfig/internal`: internal implementation.
- `src/test/java`: JUnit Jupiter tests.
- `docs`: GitHub Pages Markdown documentation.
- `.github/architecture`: architecture rules and decisions.
- `.github/workflows`: CI, CodeQL, Pages, and release automation.
